summary: No-ship: the S7 key-vault namespace can be reached through attacker-controlled metadata.session_id.

findings.title: Client-controlled session_id can collide with reserved gwkey_ vaults
findings.recommendation: Do not use raw metadata.session_id in the same namespace as per-key vault IDs. Reject or escape reserved prefixes like gwkey_, or derive structured vault keys such as explicit:<principal>:<sessionId> and key:<verifiedKeyId> so a crafted metadata.session_id cannot open another key principal's vault.
